_token_note: Prefer setting env var GOWTH_MEM_GIT_TOKEN. As fallback only, you may add a 'token' field here — but this file is gitignored so it never syncs.
_remote_note: For SSH instead of HTTPS+token, use git@github.com:USER/REPO.git
_branch_note: Default is 'main'. Use a separate branch per machine if you want to merge manually.
